query_normalized: predicting the impact of impurities on the superconductivity of magnesium diboride materials science
rationale: The paper studies how defect/impurity introduction (via neutron irradiation) alters key superconducting properties (upper critical field, anisotropy, critical current) of MgB₂, providing same‑mechanism evidence (category a) and an empirical baseline for impurity‑induced changes in superconductivity.
